title: Ore Trees
description: Adds new ore trees to the game.
body:
# Ore Trees ## Who says that money doesn't grow on trees? With this **fabric** mod you can plant ore trees. They drop sticks, more saplings and of course resources. Diamonds are a limited resource in Minecraft, so I made them grow on trees like my parents always said they don't! ### All grown trees: ![All Grown Trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lkzyaatp/images/c539cef6e26dac2f4efebb5c2dd6d439d845d83c.png)
⚠️Crafting Recipes⚠️ Iron Sapling ![Iron Tree Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lkzyaatp/images/5ef32f936362eb81097ac5e1fd1164658b742062.png) Diamond Sapling ![Diamond Tree Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lkzyaatp/images/50899cc2b3ef435c0e3eaf206a4ee5bd6056296c.png) Netherite Sapling ![Netherite Tree Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lkzyaatp/images/a0f60c6259b0f69f94ba0d0653e02d8c834e19b8.png) Emerald Sapling ![Emerald Tree Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lkzyaatp/images/0c0ac13a604664069ea6c6068677b23765a01d05.png)
# Dependencies
